statement.summary: Remembrance Day is a memorial day observed in Commonwealth member states since the end of the First World War to honour armed forces members who have died in the line of duty. The day is also marked by war remembrances in several other non-Commonwealth countries.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a descriptive/informational entry about a historical commemorative practice, not a testable proposition or axiom. It documents sociocultural fact (the existence and observance of Remembrance Day) but makes no claim requiring truth-evaluation in logical sense. It is meta-level documentation rather than a provisional axiom.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 時間の彼岸へ衰退する声が、無限の共鳴として留まる。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 中心の炎を囲む四方の星は、悼みの境界を越えて拡がる共同の想起。
